steps.title: Identify the turning signal
steps.content: The passage explicitly signals a reversal: “For a long time, people thought tool use was unique to primates. Octopuses and other animals, though, have busted the myth.” The contrast word though and the phrase busted the myth indicate the passage's core claim—a once-accepted belief is now disproven.

steps.title: Match the answer to the signal
steps.content: Choice D directly states the passage's argument: a false belief about primates has been corrected. A compares skill levels, B overgeneralizes to multiple myths, and C reverses the message. That matches choice D — D is correct.
